title: croton erythrostachys var. erythrostachys
intro: Croton erythrostachys var. erythrostachys, also known as the Red Stag Horn, is a type of plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include treating fever, pain, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antiseptic and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world to treat a range of ailments.
